fields.Front: Have you ever been to Micronesia?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu pernah ke Mikronesia?

fields.Front: I have never visited Moldova
fields.Back: Aku belum pernah mengunjungi Moldova

fields.Front: I will go to Monaco tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku akan pergi ke Monako besok

fields.Front: He does not live in Mongolia now
fields.Back: Dia tidak tinggal di Mongolia sekarang

fields.Front: Are they currently vacationing in Montenegro?
fields.Back: Apakah mereka sedang berlibur di Montenegro?

fields.Front: I have lived in Morocco for a long time
fields.Back: Aku sudah lama tinggal di Maroko

fields.Front: We will not move to Mozambique yet
fields.Back: Kami belum akan pindah ke Mozambik

fields.Front: Why did he once work in Myanmar?
fields.Back: Mengapa dia pernah bekerja di Myanmar?

fields.Front: I am exploring Namibia now
fields.Back: Aku sedang menjelajahi Namibia sekarang

fields.Front: Have you never been to Nauru?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu belum pernah ke Nauru?

fields.Front: They will climb mountains in Nepal
fields.Back: Mereka akan mendaki gunung di Nepal

fields.Front: I have lived in the Netherlands for a year
fields.Back: Aku sudah tinggal di Belanda selama setahun

fields.Front: Will you go to New Zealand this year?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu akan pergi ke Selandia Baru tahun ini?

fields.Front: I have never tried traditional Nicaraguan food
fields.Back: Aku belum pernah mencicipi makanan khas Nikaragua

fields.Front: They are researching wildlife in Niger
fields.Back: Mereka sedang meneliti satwa liar di Niger

fields.Front: I will study Nigerian culture next month
fields.Back: Aku akan belajar budaya Nigeria bulan depan

fields.Front: Have you ever seen news from North Korea?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu pernah melihat berita dari Korea Utara?

fields.Front: I do not live in Norway right now
fields.Back: Aku tidak tinggal di Norwegia saat ini

fields.Front: They will visit the traditional market in Oman
fields.Back: Mereka akan mengunjungi pasar tradisional di Oman

fields.Front: I have been studying the Pakistani language for a month
fields.Back: Aku sudah belajar bahasa Pakistan selama sebulan

fields.Front: Will they sail through the Panama Canal?
fields.Back: Apakah mereka akan berlayar di kanal Panama?

fields.Front: I have never visited the cities in Paraguay
fields.Back: Aku belum pernah mengunjungi kota-kota di Paraguay

fields.Front: He is studying Inca history in Peru
fields.Back: Dia sedang mempelajari sejarah Inca di Peru

fields.Front: I will swim at the Philippine beaches next week
fields.Back: Aku akan berenang di pantai Filipina minggu depan

fields.Front: They have already planned a trip to Poland
fields.Back: Mereka sudah merencanakan perjalanan ke Polandia

fields.Front: I am enjoying local wine in Portugal
fields.Back: Aku sedang menikmati anggur lokal di Portugal

fields.Front: Will you attend the exhibition in Qatar?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu akan menghadiri pameran di Qatar?

fields.Front: I have not visited the old castles in Romania
fields.Back: Aku belum mengunjungi kastil tua di Rumania
